---
title: "project_1"
author: "sitanshu chakraborty"
date: "2026-06-13"
output: ioslides_presentation
## The Opportunity

- Mobile typing is slow and tedious for most users.
- Our application fixes this by predicting user intent in real-time.
- Increases typing efficiency and enhances user interfaces.
- Solves the frustration of small mobile keyboards.

## The Algorithm

- Built using a massive corpus of natural language datasets.
- Utilizes N-gram frequency matrices to calculate word probabilities.
- Uses a smart "back-off" routine to maximize accuracy.
- Handles unknown words by falling back to the most common options.

## The Shiny Application

- Fast, intuitive, and extremely lightweight user interface.
- Predicts words instantly upon text entry (no "Submit" button needed).
- Dynamically queries backend data frames without lagging.
- Mobile-friendly design optimized for speed.

## Value Proposition

- Low memory footprint makes it ideal for mobile deployment.
- Scalable framework ready to incorporate Trigrams and Quadgrams.
- Ready for immediate production deployment.
- Proved concept for high-speed NLP applications.
#..........................................................
